name: Ms. Li
initialComplaint: I have this nagging cough that just won't go away. It's really annoying.

hiddenDetails.triggers: It seems worse at night and when I'm at the gym.
hiddenDetails.pastHistory: I had eczema as a child. No other major issues.
hiddenDetails.associatedSymptoms: Sometimes I feel a bit tight in my chest, like I can't get a full breath.
hiddenDetails.lifestyle: Non-smoker. I work in an office. I have a new cat.
hiddenDetails.familyHistory: My mum has hay fever and my younger brother has asthma.
hiddenDetails.drugHistory: Just over-the-counter cough syrup. It doesn't help much. No allergies.
hiddenDetails.reviewOfSystems: No fever, no weight loss, no night sweats. Sometimes a bit wheezy.

physicalExam.finding: Expiratory wheeze heard throughout both lung fields.
Dry, scaly patches on flexural surfaces of elbows.

mustAskItems.hint: How long have you had this cough?
Do you get any tightness or wheezing?
Have you had eczema, hay fever, or allergies?
Does anyone in your family have asthma or allergies?
Any new pets or changes at home?
Have you tried any medications for this?
Have you had any fevers or night sweats?
How is this affecting your day?

personality: Energetic young professional, slightly anxious. Talkative and forthcoming with details if asked. Worried she might have something serious.
speechPatterns: It's just so annoying, you know?
